tagline: Professional pool openings, closings, weekly service, and maintenance.

hero.headline:
A Crystal Clear Pool Without
Lifting a Finger
hero.subheadline: Western New York's most trusted pool service handles your openings, closings, weekly cleaning, and repairs — so you never worry about your pool again. Just grab a towel and jump in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Opening Day to Closing Day
services.subtitle: From the first warm day of spring to the last swim of fall, 716 Pool Service keeps your pool in perfect condition so you can enjoy every moment of the season.

cards.title: Pool Openings
cards.description: Start your season right. We remove and fold your winter cover, dewinterize equipment, prime and start your system, and reinstall all fittings, ladders, and railings.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Crystal clear water every week. We test and balance chemicals, vacuum with our Riptide system, empty skimmer baskets, and check all equipment — so you just swim.

cards.title: Pool Closings
cards.description: Protect your investment through harsh WNY winters. We blow out all lines, winterize every piece of equipment, and secure your cover so your pool is safe until spring.

cards.title: Repairs & Troubleshooting
cards.description: Something not right? We diagnose and repair pumps, filters, plumbing, and more. Green pool? We'll bring it back to crystal clear with our algae recovery treatment.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: New pump, filter, or heater? We handle professional installation with proper sizing, setup, and full system testing. Old equipment removal available.

cards.title: Opening & Spring Cleaning
cards.description: Why schedule two visits? We open your pool and deep clean it in one shot — cover removal, wall scrubbing, vacuuming to waste, and water balancing. Swim the same day.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or text Matt directly. We'll discuss your pool, your needs, and give you an honest quote with zero pressure. No contracts, no commitments — just straightforward service.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our experienced crew arrives on schedule and handles it all — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks. After every visit, we leave a note on your door so you know exactly what was done.

steps.title: Just Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long. If anything ever isn't right, one call to Matt and we'll make it right — that's the 716 Pool Service promise.

about.label: Why WNY Pool Owners Trust Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Trust, Not Contracts
about.description: 716 Pool Service was built on a simple idea: pool owners in Western New York deserve reliable, honest service from people who actually care. Owner Matt brings over 15 years of hands-on experience and is personally involved in every account. We're not a franchise or a faceless company — we're your neighbors, and we treat every pool like it's our own.

features.title: 15+ Years of Pool Expertise
features.description: Over 15 years servicing pools across Western New York. We understand WNY's unique seasonal demands and know exactly how to keep your pool in top shape year-round.

features.title: Owner-Operated & Responsive
features.description: When you call or text, Matt personally responds. No call centers, no runaround. You deal directly with the owner who knows your pool inside and out.

features.title: 80+ Weekly Accounts Strong
features.description: We service over 80 pools every single week. That kind of trust isn't bought — it's earned through consistent, reliable results season after season.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote based on your specific needs. No hidden fees, no upsells — just honest pricing for quality service.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not satisfied with a service visit, call Matt directly and we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on doing things right the first time — but if something isn't perfect, we won't rest until it is.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For urgent issues like a green pool or equipment breakdown, we do our best to get to you within 24-48 hours. Just call or text Matt directly.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're away. After every visit, we leave a detailed note on your door so you always know exactly what was done and if there's anything to be aware of.

faqs.question: What areas do you service in Western New York?
faqs.answer: We service pools throughout Western New York including Buffalo, Clarence, Amherst, Williamsville, Lancaster, East Aurora, Orchard Park, Hamburg, and surrounding communities. If you're in WNY, give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I need a contract for weekly service?
faqs.answer: No contracts — ever. We believe in earning your business every single visit. You can adjust, pause, or cancel your service at any time with zero fees or penalties.

faqs.question: What makes 716 Pool Service different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're a local, family-owned business where the owner Matt is personally involved in every account. With 15+ years of experience and over 80 weekly accounts, we've built our reputation on reliability, communication, and results — not sales pitches.

testimonials.name: Bernadette R.
testimonials.text: Very satisfied with 716 Pool Services. Matt and his crew are very thorough, dependable and professional. Pool is consistently well maintained. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Patrick D.
testimonials.text: Hands down the best pool service in Buffalo! We switched from Beauty Pools to 716 Pool Service and we couldn't be happier. Highly recommend for weekly pool cleaning service.

testimonials.name: Ivan P.
testimonials.text: I had been given the name of Matt from 716 Pools and was impressed from day one. He is the best — takes care of everything, water crystal clear, pool immaculate, very personable, and he leaves a note on the door about what was done.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Matt personally. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing from a family business that treats your pool like their own.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
